occupation: Chief Operating Officer, Outdoor - UK & International at Global
headline: Global - Chief Operating Officer, Outdoor - UK & International
summary:
Experienced Managing Director and Senior Executive with extensive experience in the media, marketing and advertising industry. Skilled in Leadership, Strategy, Media, Advertising and Sales.

A strong business development professional with a wide relationship network amongst the Media, Out of Home and Transport industry.

experiences.title: Chief Operating Officer, Outdoor - UK & International
Group Chief Strategy Officer & Managing Director - UK
experiences.description:
Leading Exterion Media’s business in the UK to generate income for our partners and shareholders
- Developing the strategic direction of Exterion Media UK & Group
- Playing a leading role in the development and growth of the Out-of-Home industry in the UK
- Fostering deep and valuable relationships with the leading media agencies and advertisers
- Responsible for the sales and safe and timely delivery of advertising, particularly in the transport, 
digital and retail sector of Out-of-Home

experiences.title: Group Development Director
experiences.description:
A newly created role focussing on the future growth of Exterion Media across the Group, developing new relationships, new OOH and digital opportunities, new markets and partnerships. 

The role is also responsible for assessing new technologies and platforms as the company continues to digitise and transform to be a digital media business powered by data.

experiences.title: Managing Director, UK
experiences.description:
Leading Exterion Media’s business in the UK to generate income for our partners and shareholders
- Developing the strategic direction of Exterion Media UK
- Playing a lead role in the development and growth of the Out-of-Home industry in the UK, through being a senior representative for Exterion Media on the Board of Outsmart (the Out-of-Home trade association) and Route (the joint industry research body)
- Fostering deep and valuable relationships with the leading media agencies and advertisers
- Responsible for the sales and safe and timely delivery of advertising, particularly in the transport, digital and retail sector of Out-of-Home

Key achievements
Delivering the 2012 Olympic sales strategy (Campaign OOH sales team of the year)
Leading the business through a transition in ownership from CBS Corporation to private equity ownership - Platinum Equity
Rebranding in the UK from CBS Outdoor to Exterion Media
Key member of the team developing and leading the strategy to retain the London Underground assets
Move from Camden London to new agile modern work space at Lacon London - Holborn
5 years of consistent growth - revenues and profit

experiences.title: Director of Franchise and Asset Strategy
experiences.description:
Responsible for asset development strategy and our partner relationships for Bus, London Rail, National Rail & Westfield in the UK. 

During this time I led the pitch to become the Sponsorship partner for the 2012 Olympic Games, which we won and subsequently managed. Also the board director responsible for the Westfield Stratford City pitch, again awarded to CBS Outdoor and was responsible for the subsequent management thereafter.

Board responsibility for delivery of quality displays safely on time on Bus and National Rail assets, as well as Board responsibility for the in house production dept producing quality posters for our advertisers.

experiences.title: Franchise Director
experiences.description: Responsible for our partner relationships  and asset development for Bus and National Rail in the UK. Board responsibility for delivery of quality displays safely on time on Bus and National Rail assets, as well as Board responsibility for the in house production dept producing quality posters for our advertisers.

volunteer_work.title: Speaker
volunteer_work.description: Speaking at High Schools regarding our business, media generally and or careers in media. Organised through www.Speakers4Schools.org Great fun and very rewarding.

recommendations:
Steve Reynolds

Jason is a level headed strategic thinker with a professional outlook to all he does

Rebecca Mitchell

Jason was a great boss during my time at Exterion Media. As a Line Manager he was always incredibly supportive of me in my role, had an open door policy & always gave great advice. As an MD, he hugely cares about the business, the team and supports professional development. He’s also really creative and a good laugh. Thanks for everything JC, I’ll miss working with you!
